name: Herbed Pork Cutlets,greek Vegetable Salad W/couscous,cucumber
recipeIngredient: 2 medium tomatoes, cored and in chunks
1 green bell pepper, seeded and chunked
1 1/2 pounds boneless pork loin, cut into 12 slices
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the ingredients for the marinade.
2. Stir 2 tablespoons of the marinade into yogurt; add cucumber. Toss tomatoes, bell pepper, olives, and red onion with 1/4 cup of the marinade.
3. Marinate pork in the remaining marinade for 15 minutes.
4. Preheat broiler or grill and bring chicken broth to a boil. Stir in couscous, remove from heat, cover, and let stand for 10 minutes.
5. Crumble feta cheese and toss into Greek salad.
6. Cook pork 3 to 4 minutes per side until just cooked through. Serve Greek salad over couscous.
Per serving of meal: 1,110 calories (57% from fat); 70 grams fat.
